compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1000e DE, Pro 600e, Pro 1000e DE Flex
compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: proprietary Gavita e-series bus (RJ 4P4C controller side / RJ 6P4C fixture side)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, auto-shutdown, sunrise/sunset ramping, PID temperature-based fan coordination
compatible_devices.notes: 1 channel; up to 40 single bus / 500 repeater bus fixtures; 50-115% output range; F variant adds integrated 0-10V EC fan control with PID algorithm for coordinated temperature management

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: Pro 1700e LED, Pro 900e LED, CT1930e LED
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita E-Series LED Adapter Interconnect Cable (HGC906716 / HGC906717)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: auto-dim on high temperature, sunrise/sunset ramping, PID fan-light coordination
compatible_devices.notes: LED adapter cable mandatory; dimming range 50-100% for LED; fan control (PID) integrates well with LED dimming for combined temperature management

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: PID auto-tuning fan speed, temperature-based ramp, event logging of temperature extremes
compatible_devices.notes: 1 EC fan output; up to 2 fans connected; control range 10-100%; 0-10V signal via 4P4C RJ9 connector; Gavita Vector EC fans are the primary confirmed compatible brand; third-party 0-10V EC fans require wiring adapter to RJ9 and are not officially supported; FB1 Fan Balancer (sold separately) allows intake/exhaust offset

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: 0-10V (4P4C RJ9) to EFM1, then AC mains to fan
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita EFM1 External Fan Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: temperature-based fan speed control via EFM1 (burst-modulated AC at low speed, phase-cut at high speed)
compatible_devices.notes: EFM1 compatible exclusively with EL1F/EL2F Gen 2 (not with EL1/EL2 without F); EFM1 max 6A/240V (1.44kW); any AC fan within EFM1 power limits compatible; EFM1 plugs inline between mains and fan with signal cable to controller

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.notes: ECM1 support for EL1F is confirmed by some retailers (IndoorGrowStore) but disputed by others (FutureGarden); verify directly with Gavita before purchase; on/off only if compatible; max 16A AC1 load

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.notes: ECM1 support for EL1F is confirmed by some retailers but disputed by others; on/off switching only if compatible; verify with Gavita before purchase

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: low-voltage control signal via cage clamp screw terminals
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: Gavita ECM1 External Contactor Module (sold separately)
compatible_devices.notes: ECM1 support for EL1F is confirmed by some retailers but disputed by others; on/off switching only if compatible; max 16A AC1 / 1.5kW AC3 inductive load; verify with Gavita before purchase
